title: temporal climate options
method: trace reconstruction from local /mnt NOEMA snaps, manifests, results, and latest available repo snapshot; not byte-perfect original unless marked materialized.
repo_snapshot_note: Full repo snapshot copied from v08 source as closest materialized full repository surface. Version-specific artifacts are also copied separately under artifacts/.
epistemic_boundary: Reconstructed package; use manifests and noema_trace/ for provenance. Do not treat trace-only versions as original byte-exact source ZIPs.
